title: CitationTraverseInput
description: Input contract for the citation-traverse orchestration: trace citation chains from a seed paper via ASTA snippet search.

seed_paper_id.description: CorpusId, DOI (DOI:...), or PMID of the atlas paper.

query.description: Search query constructed from: '{label} / {resolved_name} in {scope} {tissue}: location, structure, function, markers'.

depth.description: Citation traversal depth. 0 = seed papers only.

traversal_dir.description: Directory path where traversal output files will be written (all_summaries.json, paper_catalogue.json, depth_N_*.json). Typically projects/{project}/traversal_output/{cell_type}/.
